description: Per-problem empirical answer distributions from 30 stochastic reference reproduction runs of submission 'sebastiangil00/aimo3-v7-winner-fork Version 12' against the 10 official AIMO3 reference problems. Values are the fraction of the 30 runs that produced a given answer.
notes: Used by verify.py --mode stochastic to assess whether a re-implementation's answers lie in the support of our observed distribution. min_support threshold of 0.05 is applied by default, requiring an answer to appear in at least 5% (>=2 of 30) of reference runs.
